tasks.label: stop-one-pod
args: $pod = kubectl get pods -A --field-selector=status.phase=Running -o jsonpath='{range .items[*]}{.metadata.namespace}{"|"}{.metadata.name}{"`n"}{end}' | Select-Object -First 1; if (-not $pod) { Write-Output 'NO_RUNNING_PODS'; exit 0 }; $parts = $pod -split '\|'; $ns = $parts[0]; $name = $parts[1]; Write-Output "Deleting pod: ${ns}/${name}"; kubectl delete pod $name -n $ns; Write-Output "`nCurrent pods in ${ns}:"; kubectl get pods -n $ns

tasks.label: stop-one-pod-simple
args: $line = kubectl get pods -A --field-selector=status.phase=Running --no-headers | Select-Object -First 1; if (-not $line) { Write-Output 'NO_RUNNING_PODS'; exit 0 }; $parts = ($line -replace '^\s+','') -split '\s+'; $ns = $parts[0]; $name = $parts[1]; Write-Output "Deleting pod: ${ns}/${name}"; kubectl delete pod $name -n $ns; Write-Output "`nCurrent pods in ${ns}:"; kubectl get pods -n $ns

tasks.label: stop-one-pod-no-singlequotes
args: $line = kubectl get pods -A --field-selector=status.phase=Running --no-headers | Select-Object -First 1; if (-not $line) { Write-Output "NO_RUNNING_PODS"; exit 0 }; $parts = $line -split "\s+"; $ns = $parts[0]; $name = $parts[1]; Write-Output "Deleting pod: ${ns}/${name}"; kubectl delete pod $name -n $ns; Write-Output "`nCurrent pods in ${ns}:"; kubectl get pods -n $ns
